sglang.title: Fix port overflow in DP attention path when base port is near 65535
sglang.author: janbernloehr
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Motivation
When using --enable-dp-attention with a high base port (e.g., assigned by SLURM near 65535), SGLang derives TCP ports by incrementing from the dist-init port (port_base + 1 through port_base + 4). These derived ports can exceed the valid TCP range (0–65535), causing crashes with Attribute

sglang.title: [PD][MoRI] Drive KV transfers with a sharded synchronous worker pool
sglang.author: maning00
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Summary
Refactor the MoRI PD KV-transfer path to a bounded, per-room–sharded pool of synchronous workers: send() only enqueues; workers do batch_write → wait_all → notify. This moves both submission and completion off the prefill scheduler thread and bounds in-flight transfers.
Motivation
The old pa

sglang.title: [EPD] Support dynamic encoder register
sglang.author: liusy58
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Motivation
EPD (--language-only) servers require --encoder-urls to be specified statically at startup, making it impossible to add/replace encoders without a full restart. A dedicated bootstrap server is needed to allow encoders to register themselves dynamically, enabling flexible encoder discovery

sglang.title: Fix TP deadlock in unified radix cache writing_check / loading_check
sglang.author: ispobock
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Motivation
A permanent TP deadlock has been observed in UnifiedRadixCache.writing_check after a long run with HiCache enabled. py-spy fingerprint:

TP0: all_reduce → writing_check → check_hicache_events → get_new_batch_prefill_raw → event_loop_overlap
TP1-3: broadcast → broadcast_pyobj → recv_reques

sglang.title: [AMD] ci: reinstall MoRI if Different from Dockerfile-pinned commit during install_dependency
sglang.author: bingxche
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Summary

The AMD CI image bakes MoRI at the commit pinned in docker/rocm.Dockerfile (MORI_COMMIT). When a PR bumps MORI_COMMIT ahead of the published image, the image is not rebuilt per-PR, so stage-b-test-large-8-gpu-mi35x-disaggregation-amd runs against a stale MoRI (e.g. missing newer IOEngine AP

sglang.title: [PD] Downgrade propagated rank failure logs from error to debug
sglang.author: ShangmingCai
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Motivation
In PD (Prefill-Decode) disaggregated serving, when a KV transfer failure occurs on one rank, the failure propagates to all other ranks involved in the same transfer room. Currently, every rank logs the failure at error (decode side) or warning (prefill side) level — even ranks that didn't

sglang.title: Fix NaN in triton EAGLE spec-v2 draft-extend CUDA graph at topk>1 (wrong qo_indptr stride)
sglang.author: hnyls2002
sglang.bodyExcerpt: The draft-extend CUDA-graph metadata built qo_indptr with a per-req stride of num_steps+1, but the runner lays out num_draft_tokens tokens/req. For topk>1 these differ, so at bs>1 each req's queries read from the wrong offset -> NaN (bs==1 and eager are unaffected). Use num_draft_tokens for the v2 d

sglang.title: [HiCache][Dsv4] Don't cache C128 State pool in L3
sglang.author: vladnosiv
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Motivation
The C128 State Pool is added to the list of pools for HiCache. However, due to the fact that the page size is 256 and is divisible by 128, the tail is actually empty on the cache hit boundary. And accordingly, it is never consumed during a cache hit. At the same time, slots are being allo

sglang.title: Avoid cache_unfinished_req depending on fill_len
sglang.author: fzyzcjy
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Stacked on #27571.
cache_unfinished_req inserts a still-running request's KV into the prefix tree. It keyed the radix tree (and the chunked prefix_indices slice) on fill_len, an extend-phase field, while its sibling cache_finished_req already keys on kv_committed_len. At every cache_unfinished_req c

sglang.title: [XPU][NIXL] Use uint64 for XPU address arithmetic in prep handle builders
sglang.author: Jianhong-Zhang
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
XPU device addresses have bit 63 set (e.g. 0xffff81ab54e01000), which
exceeds the np.int64 range and causes silent overflow when used in numpy
arithmetic. Additionally, multiplying np.int64 index arrays by np.uint64
scalars upcasts to float64 in numpy, further corrupting address values.

While investigat

I would still like to thank @Abatom and everyone who was contributed to the connector as this helped PD take off the ground in its early stages.

vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Summary
Fixes #44110 at the root cause, as an alternative to #44113.
MarlinFP8ScaledMMLinearKernel.process_weights_after_loading previously
tried to detect whether its incoming weight was (N, K) or (K, N) and
transpose accordingly. The shape-based heuristic was a no-op when
N == K, silently corrupti

vllm.title: [Rust Frontend] [Refactor] Refine utility call interfaces
vllm.author: BugenZhao
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Purpose
Minor refinements on Rust frontend utility-call interfaces. Follow-up of #44499.

Add a protocol-owned PauseMode enum for abort / wait / keep, and use it for sleep and pause_scheduler instead of passing raw strings.
Reuse a call_utility_consensus helper for utility calls whose results must a

vllm.title: [Misc] usage_stats: report more engine, spec-decode, and EP config
vllm.author: zlxi02
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Added fields to usage_stats so we can better understand how people use vLLM in production and which fields to focus efforts on.
Fields added:

Batching limits: max_model_len, max_num_seqs, max_num_batched_tokens
Spec decoding spec_decode_method, num_speculative_tokens
Wide expert parallel: enable_ep

vllm.author: AndreasKaratzas

vllm.author: liulanze
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Purpose
Fixes #44180.
During profile_run the multimodal grid_thw arrives on CPU, so the cu_seqlens tensor built from it inherits the CPU device. Passing this CPU tensor into the FA3 vit attention path raises RuntimeError: cu_seqlens_q must be on CUDA and crashes engine init when loading Qwen/Qwen3-O

The fix reserves the maximum FP8 prefill scratch shapes while initializi

vllm.title: [Bugfix][Rust Frontend] Set a structured-output backend so requests do not 500
vllm.author: Sunt-ing
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Purpose
With VLLM_USE_RUST_FRONTEND=1, every structured-output request (response_format json_schema/json_object, structured_outputs regex/choice) returns HTTP 500: the engine raises Unsupported structured output backend: None in grammar_init. The backend is normally resolved by SamplingParams._valid

vllm.title: fix: prevent MM cache hang from stale LRU order keys
vllm.author: jeffye-dev
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
FIX #43941
LRUCache.touch() inserted keys into the internal LRU order even when the key was not present in the cache data. The multimodal processor and receiver caches touch every hash in a request before updating the cache so that items used by the current request are not evicted midway through the

vllm.title: [Bugfix][CI] Gemma3 Transformers multimodal encoder profiling and build prompt-embedding fixtures
vllm.author: AndreasKaratzas
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
This PR:

Bugfixes Gemma3 Transformers multimodal encoder profiling to use Gemma3's vision patch-token scale.
Builds prompt-embedding fixtures (gated on ROCm only) before starting the API server so HF cleanup is not blocked by vLLM-owned GPU memory.

The Gemma3 failure showed up as a ROCm GPU hang i

vllm.author: parthash0804
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Summary
Resampler2_5.forward adds the cached positional embedding to the input without moving it to the input's device:
pos_embed = self.pos_embed[:tgt_h, :tgt_w, :].reshape((tgt_h * tgt_w, -1)).to(dtype)
...
x + pos_embed   # <-- x is on cuda, pos_embed is on cpu
